---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a broken or unexpected workflow behavior
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: casper-justus
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to Actions tab
2. Trigger workflow manually or wait for scheduled run
3. Observe failure

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Workflow Run URL
Paste the link to the failed Actions run here.

## Environment
- Repo visibility: (public / private)
- Branch: `main`

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information.
